login.title: Login
login.description: Enter your username below to login to your account

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your information below to create your account
register.passwordHint: Must be at least 6 characters long.

upload.title: Upload
upload.subtitle: Drop files or folders, or browse to upload
upload.dropHint: Drop files or folders here or click to browse
upload.supportedTypes: Images, GIF, video, code, PDF and more
upload.sharexDescription: Download the .sxcu config and import it into ShareX
upload.sharexKeyNote: Downloading generates a new API key — any previously configured tools will need the new key.
upload.keyShownOnce: Copy this key now — it will not be shown again.
upload.apiDescription: Use curl or any HTTP client
upload.folderDropHint: Folders can be added via drag & drop

settings.title: Settings
settings.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters
settings.embedModeDescription: Controls how your files appear when shared on Discord or other platforms
settings.gdprDescription: You have the right to access and delete your personal data.
settings.exportDataDescription: Download all your account data and file metadata as JSON (GDPR Art. 20).
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all uploaded files. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmDesc: Your account, all uploaded files, and all associated data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
settings.cookieConsentDescription: Manage your consent for Cloudflare Web Analytics on this instance.
settings.objectionDescription: You have the right to object to the processing of your personal data based on legitimate interest (e.g. session cookies for security logging). Submit your objection by contacting the operator.
settings.objectionContact: Or contact the operator directly at:
settings.objectionEmailSubject: GDPR Art. 21 – Objection to data processing
settings.objectionEmailBody:
Hello,

I hereby object to the processing of my personal data based on legitimate interest under GDPR Art. 21.

Username: {{username}}

Please acknowledge this objection and inform me of the measures taken.

Regards

fileView.deleteDescription: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.createUserDesc: New users are created with a random API key
adminUsers.deleteUserDesc: User "{{username}}" and all their files ({{count}}) will be permanently deleted.
adminUsers.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
adminUsers.newKeyDesc: Copy this key now — it will not be shown again.

adminSiteSettings.title: Site Settings
adminSiteSettings.privacyDescription: These values appear in the public Privacy Policy page. All fields are required for GDPR compliance.
adminSiteSettings.retentionDescription: Automatically delete uploaded files after a set number of days. Set to 0 to keep files indefinitely.
adminSiteSettings.retentionHint: 0 = no automatic deletion. Files are deleted at server startup and then every 24 hours. Users can still delete files manually at any time.
adminSiteSettings.securityDescription: Document the security measures in place for this instance.
adminSiteSettings.encryptionLabel: Disk/volume encryption is configured on this server
adminSiteSettings.encryptionHint: Check this if the server volume is encrypted (e.g. LUKS, cloud provider encryption, encrypted Docker volume). This is documented in the Privacy Policy under section 6.
adminSiteSettings.analyticsDescription: Enable the cookie consent notice when Cloudflare Web Analytics is active on this instance.
adminSiteSettings.analyticsLabel: Cloudflare Web Analytics is enabled on this instance
adminSiteSettings.analyticsHint: Cloudflare Web Analytics is cookie-free. Enabling this shows an informational banner to users so they are aware of the data collection, as required by GDPR Art. 13.

adminImport.title: Migrate from XBackBone
adminImport.subtitle: Migrate files and metadata from an existing XBackBone instance.
adminImport.pathsDesc: Both paths must be accessible on the server filesystem. Mount them as read-only Docker volumes if needed, e.g.:
adminImport.userMappingDesc: Users auto-matched by username are pre-filled. Adjust as needed. Files from unmatched XBackBone users are assigned to the fallback user (if set).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.incompleteBody: Some fields have not been configured yet. Admins can fill them in under Admin → Site Settings.
privacy.s1Body: The controller responsible for the processing of personal data on this instance of Sharely is:
privacy.s2Intro: We process only the data strictly necessary to provide the service:
privacy.dataFiles: Uploaded files & metadata (name, size, type, upload date)
privacy.s2NoEmail: We do not collect email addresses, IP addresses, real names, phone numbers, or location data.
privacy.s3Body: Account data (username, profile picture) is retained for as long as your account exists. You may delete your account at any time in Settings, which permanently removes all associated files and personal data. Session data expires after 7 days of inactivity.
privacy.s3BodyRetention: Uploaded files are automatically deleted after {{days}} days, even if your account remains active.
privacy.s3BodyNoRetention: Uploaded files are retained until you delete them manually or delete your account.
privacy.s4Intro: Under the GDPR you have the following rights:
privacy.right15Desc: You may request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.right16Desc: You may correct inaccurate data (e.g. username) in Settings.
privacy.right17Desc: You may delete your account and all associated data at any time in Settings.
privacy.right20Desc: You may download a machine-readable export of your data from Settings.
privacy.right21Desc: You may object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.rightsExercise: Rights under Art. 15–20 can be exercised directly via
privacy.rightsSupervisory: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority responsible for your country.
privacy.s5Session: We use a single technically-necessary session cookie to keep you logged in. No consent is required for this cookie as it is essential for the service to function.
privacy.s5NoTracking: We do not use any analytics, advertising, or fingerprinting cookies.
privacy.s5CloudflareActive: This instance uses Cloudflare Web Analytics (cookie-free) to measure site traffic. No personal data is stored by Cloudflare Web Analytics; only anonymised metrics are collected. You can manage your consent in Settings.
privacy.s5CloudflareInactive: No third-party analytics or tracking tools are active on this instance.
privacy.s5bIntro: We use the following data processors (Art. 28 GDPR). A Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is in place with each processor:
privacy.s5bNoProcessors: No external data processors are currently active on this instance.
privacy.s6Body: Passwords are stored as bcrypt hashes (12 rounds). API keys are stored as SHA-256 hashes; the plaintext is never persisted. All connections are encrypted via TLS in production. Access to the server and database is restricted to authorised personnel only.
privacy.s6Encryption: Uploaded files are stored on an encrypted volume (encryption at rest is enabled on this server).
privacy.s6NoEncryption: Uploaded files are not encrypted at the application level. Encryption at rest depends on the operator's server and storage configuration.
privacy.s7Body: The operator may update this policy at any time. The date of the latest revision will be noted above. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.version: Sharely – open-source file sharing · Privacy Policy

cookieBanner.text: This site uses Cloudflare Web Analytics (cookie-free) to understand traffic.
